commit_message:
docs(closeout): reconcile cognition for cluster POL-562

Run: polaris-run-medic-route-health-2026-07-14-001
Cluster: POL-562
Children: POL-563, POL-564, POL-565, POL-566, POL-567, POL-568
Files updated:
- POLARIS.md: 4 files
- SUMMARY.md: 3 files
- docs ingested: 0
- links repaired: 0

polaris_md_updates.change_summary: Fixed stale claim that assessRouteHealth() writes no files; documented route-health.json persistence via writeRouteHealthState/readRouteHealthState consumed by welfare.ts and route-exam.ts.
Added route-exam.ts and route-exam.test.ts to folder inventory; documented proactive route-exam as a non-symptom-driven counterpart to run-health consults.
Added the new `polaris medic route-exam <route>` subcommand to the medic.ts bullet.
Added medic.md to the Read-before-editing role-file list (bundled workspace asset was missing).

summary_md_updates.change_summary: Replaced never-completed draft template with real current-state content covering chart-id, chart-schema, run-health-consult, and the new route-exam capability.
Added a bullet documenting route-health.json persistence and its consumers.
Updated medic command-group sentence to include `medic route-exam <route>`.

evidence_summary: Reconciled POLARIS.md/SUMMARY.md for the six-child POL-562 medic route-health cluster (chart-id, chart-schema, route-cognition-delta, chart linking, route-exam, graph.ts fix). Corrected a canon mismatch in src/cognition/POLARIS.md: assessRouteHealth() now persists state to route-health.json rather than being write-free, and welfare.ts/route-exam.ts consume that persisted state. Filled in src/medic/SUMMARY.md, which had never been promoted past its generated draft template, with real current-state content covering the new route-exam.ts capability. Updated src/cli/POLARIS.md and SUMMARY.md to mention the new `medic route-exam <route>` subcommand, and added the missing medic.md role-file reference in src/workspace/POLARIS.md. src/types/*, src/graph/POLARIS.md were already reconciled inline by their owning children (POL-563, POL-568) and needed no further change; src/loop, src/map, src/finalize, and root src/ docs remain accurate at their current level of description. No docs required ingestion/promotion; no cognition notes were pending. All 7 files committed in a single librarian commit (5b0224f); no runtime state was touched.
